hard_rule: One archive/category is always a 30-day cycle. A group is not 30 days; group route duration equals archive_count * 30 days.
date_rule_for_notion_timeline: Only currently active groups default to their real active-slot start date. Queued group dates must be computed from active-slot promotion rules or explicit project state; never default every queued group to today.
learning_note_language_rule: Learning notes, daily logs, reviews, and Notion note content must be Chinese by default. Keep English only for unavoidable professional terms, API names, paper/category codes, exact source titles, and tool names.
daily_session_header_rule: Every arXiv daily teaching output must first state Global Day and the exact current archive code/name/day, for example PHYS / quant-ph Quantum Physics / 第3/30天. Do not identify lessons only by group. Teach one archive per output; other active archives may appear only as queued next actions.
daily_judgment_question: 如果我是交易系统/研究系统/agent 系统，今天这个概念会让我避免哪一种亏钱、误判或伪知识错觉？

active_tracks.last_lesson_status: D004 adverse selection validated on 2026-06-22. User understands fill success is not trade quality; post-fill adverse mid/mark movement can indicate toxic flow or informed counterparty. Independent transfer passed in limit sell 100 then mid 100.70 scenario, with correction that price moved up, not down.

D003 amplitude vs probability validated on 2026-06-14. User understands model confidence/signal/score as an intermediate quantity that must not be treated as real-world validated probability or executable result.

D003 distribution, variance, and tail risk validated on 2026-06-22. User understands that posterior/win rate/mean alone cannot grant action permission; action gate requires distribution, EV, variance, tail risk, costs, liquidity, and rollback. Base-rate arithmetic still needs reinforcement: P(A|E) example corrected to about 9.17%, not 90%.

promotion_rule: Three active slots are maintained. From 2026-06-15 the active groups are Q-FIN, PHYS, and MATH. When an active group completes, the next queued group in group_order starts the next calendar day in the freed slot. Do not assign queued group start dates before promotion unless the queue simulation already determines them.
